raw_consumer_statement:
I had a Citi Double Cash Rewards mastercard. I was fraudulently charged {$13.00} in XX/XX/XXXX for a XXXX purchase that was charged to an old credit card number from XXXX  months prior but somehow was charged to the new card. They initially reversed the charge and credited my account on XX/XX/XXXX. However the fool handling the account double credited the amount and then took away the credit leaving the charge there. I had to spend over XXXX hours on the phone with people hanging up on me and transferring me to the wrong departments and/or leaving me on hold for extended periods of time. I was assured that no charges would be allowed from this merchant ever again in the XXXX call and was issued a new credit card with a new number. 
In XX/XX/XXXX I received another charge from the same merchant for the same thing I was promised would never happen again. I had to spend another hour and a half on the phone with inept personnel trying to resolve it. I was issued another credit card with another different number and told my dispute would be handled quickly. 
On XX/XX/XXXX I received a bill from the credit card company stating I had to pay the fraudulent charge. I spent XXXX hours on the phone with more inept personnel and endured hang ups and long holds. I was ultimately told that the investigator that handles my claim has not been doing his job and he is the only one that can fix the issue. The lady said she sent an email to his boss and hm to resolve the issue by XX/XX/XXXX. This is totally unacceptable that XXXX incompetent employee is the only person that can fix the issue. I was told to pay the bill and request the credit later on. I refuse to pay it and then ask for my money back from this Citi Card Company that fix a simple issue in XXXX months. They told me I would receive late fees and interest charges if I didn't pay the bill. They want me to pay for t and then follow up with several more hours on the phone trying to convince a bunch of buffoons that the issue is fixed.
